nodes.name: Bean & Cheese Burritos — Garlic-Ginger Bake
nodes.description: name: Bean & Cheese Burritos — Garlic-Ginger Bake | short_description: Warm garlic-ginger baked burritos with black beans, cheddar, salsa, and greens in whole-wheat tortillas. | meal_suggestion: Serve
nodes.premise: Meal: Bean & Cheese Burritos — Garlic-Ginger Bake - name: Bean & Cheese Burritos — Garlic-Ginger Bake | short_description: Warm garlic-ginger baked burritos with black beans, cheddar, salsa, and greens in whole-wheat tortillas. | meal_suggestion: Serve with extra greens or fresh salsa; add a piece of fruit on the side. For a lighter version, use reduced-fat cheese or low-sodium salsa; to boost protein, add a dollop of Greek yogurt on the side. | nutrition_note: High in fiber and plant-based protein from black beans and whole-wheat tortillas; calcium from cheddar; greens add vitamins and minerals. The dish can be higher in sodium from cheese and salsa, so consider low-sodium cheese/salsa or add more vegetables to increase volume with less salt.

nodes.name: Homemade Pizza Night — Sesame Twist
nodes.description: name: Homemade Pizza Night — Sesame Twist | short_description: Wholesome whole-wheat crust pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell peppers; sesame twist adds extra flavor and fats if
nodes.premise: Meal: Homemade Pizza Night — Sesame Twist - name: Homemade Pizza Night — Sesame Twist | short_description: Wholesome whole-wheat crust pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, mushrooms, and bell peppers; sesame twist adds extra flavor and fats if used. | meal_suggestion: Top with sesame seeds (optional); choose part-skim mozzarella; load with peppers and mushrooms; serve with a simple green salad. | nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-wheat crust; calcium and protein from mozzarella; lycopene from tomato sauce; vitamins A and C from bell peppers; mushrooms add minerals. Optional sesame seeds provide healthy fats. For lower sodium, use reduced-sodium sauce and lighter cheese; pair with a side salad for more veggies.

nodes.premise: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Bake - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Garlic-Ginger Bake | short_description: Baked stuffed bell peppers filled with ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar. | meal_suggestion: Serve 1–2 stuffed peppers per person with a green salad or steamed vegetables; for lower calories, use brown rice and reduced-fat cheddar; can be made ahead and reheated. | nutrition_note: Lean turkey provides protein; rice gives carbs; peppers add fiber and vitamins; cheddar supplies calcium and fat. Tomato sauce adds lycopene; sodium varies by sauce—use low-sodium options to reduce sodium.
